languages.text:
The Pet immediately restores 100% Wounds and removes all injuries. The Pet is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, all attacks of the Mastiff deal bonus damage equal to {uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% max Wounds of the target.

traits.locale_text:
The Pet immediately restores 100% Wounds and removes all injuries. The Pet is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, all attacks of the Mastiff deal bonus damage equal to {uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% max Wounds of the target.

languages.text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full wounds (even if it has 0 wounds). All injuries are removed from it. The Overseer's next three abilities cost −1 AP less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals an additional +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's maximum wounds</u> damage.

The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

languages.text:
Кибермастиф немедленно полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзирателя{/g} требуют на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} меньше.
До конца боя кибермастиф наносит дополнительный урон, равный {uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% от {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g} цели.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full wounds (even if it has 0 wounds). The Overseer's next three abilities cost −1 AP less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's maximum wounds</u>.

traits.locale_text:
Кибермастиф немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя кибермастиф наносит дополнительный урон, равный {uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% от максимального здоровья цели.

Кибермастиф немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя кибермастиф наносит дополнительный урон, равный {uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% от максимального здоровья цели.

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff regeneriert seine {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} kosten -1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes verursacht der Cyber-Mastiff zusätzlichen Schaden in Höhe von +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % der {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g} des Ziels.</u>
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff regeneriert seine Wunden vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei Fähigkeiten des Aufsehers kosten -1 AP weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes verursacht der Cyber-Mastiff zusätzlichen Schaden in Höhe von +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % der maximalen Wunden des Ziels.</u>

languages.text:
Le cyber-mastiff régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} est réduit de −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, le cyber-mastiff inflige des dégâts supplémentaires égaux à +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % des {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximums{/g} de la cible.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
Le cyber-mastiff régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de blessures (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines capacités du surveillant est réduit de −1 PA.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, le cyber-mastiff inflige des dégâts supplémentaires égaux à +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % des blessures maximums de la cible.

languages.text:
完全恢复生化獒犬的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}接下来的3个{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}，消耗的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}降低1点。
生化獒犬的所有攻击都会额外造成<u>目标{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}的{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}%</u>点伤害，效果持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
完全恢复生化獒犬的生命值（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。监察官接下来的3个能力，消耗的行动点数降低1点。
生化獒犬的所有攻击都会额外造成<u>目标最大生命值的{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}%</u>点伤害，效果持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
El cibermastín recupera inmediatamente todas las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} cuestan −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Hasta el final del combate, el cibermastín inflige daño adicional igual a +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % de las {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g} del objetivo</u>.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
El cibermastín recupera inmediatamente todas las heridas (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 capacidades del supervisor cuestan −1 PA.
Hasta el final del combate, el cibermastín inflige daño adicional igual a +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f} % de las heridas máximas del objetivo</u>.

languages.text:
サイバーマスチフは即座に全快まで回復する（{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0の場合も）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}監督官{/g}の次の3つの{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}コストが-1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}される。
戦闘終了まで、サイバーマスチフは<u>そのターゲットの{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大の傷{/g}の+{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}%</u>と同じ追加ダメージを与える。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
サイバーマスチフは即座に全快まで回復する（傷が0の場合も）。監督官の次の3つのアビリティコストが-1APされる。
戦闘終了まで、サイバーマスチフは<u>そのターゲットの最大の傷の+{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}%</u>と同じ追加ダメージを与える。

languages.text:
Siber mastif, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur ({g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık puanı{/g} 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen'in{/g} sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcar.
Siber mastif, +<u>hedefinin {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık puanının{/g} %{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}</u> kadarına denk ilave hasar verir. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

Until the end of combat, the cyber-mastiff deals additional damage equal to +<u>{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}% of target's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}</u>.

traits.locale_text:
Siber mastif, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur (sağlık puanı 0 olsa bile). Gözetmen'in sonraki üç kabiliyeti 1 puan daha az EP harcar.
Siber mastif, +<u>hedefinin maksimum sağlık puanının %{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}</u> kadarına denk ilave hasar verir. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

Siber mastif, +<u>hedefinin maksimum sağlık puanının %{uip|Damage|67bed913aca646fca8bef97d7cc0648f}</u> kadarına denk ilave hasar verir. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
